prompt: cube icon with sprouting leaf corner, forest-green background, white negative-space linework, modern skeuo-flat mix, this icon is for an eco delivery app
prompt_refined: Generate a modern app icon: A geometric cube, designed with subtle skeuomorphic 3D depth and clean, flat design principles. A single leaf sprouts naturally from one corner of the cube. The background is a solid forest-green. All outlines, details, and the sprouting leaf's features are rendered in crisp white linework, creating a distinct negative-space effect. The overall style should be professional, minimalist, and emblematic of an eco-delivery service.
objects: Geometric cube with subtle skeuomorphic 3D depth
Single leaf sprouting from one corner of the cube
Crisp white linework outlining the geometric cube
Crisp white linework for details on the geometric cube
Crisp white linework for features on the single leaf
